summary: Analysis of water consumption by major AI data centers in 2025.
key_quotes:
  - "Data centers consumed an estimated 1.7 billion gallons of water for AI workloads alone."
  - "Without intervention, AI-related water consumption could double by 2027."
---
This report examines water consumption patterns of major AI data centers across North America and Europe during 2025, finding a 35% increase driven by training infrastructure expansion.
